versions.label: install-manifest-spec v0.3.1 + v0.4 mirror
changes: Mirrored install-manifest-spec v0.3.1 schema (/schemas/install-manifest-v0.3.1.json) — additive fixes from Muninn consumer tests: kill_switch.kind='none', inline kill_switch.manual.instructions, tool.namespace, runtime.install.layout enum, smoke.success.json_pointer_in/present

Mirrored install-manifest-spec v0.4 schema (/schemas/install-manifest-v0.4.json) — closes #4 (data_boundary.transmits[].to_kind='agent-supplied' + to_constraint) and #5 (runtime.install.method='preinstalled' + locator)
Updated landing page schema section: v0.4 shown as current; v0.3.1, v0.3 shown as superseded with GitHub links; v0.2 and v0.1 shown as frozen
Version pill row updated to v0.4 · current | v0.3.1 · superseded | v0.2 · frozen | v0.1 · legacy
Bumped footer version to v0.8

versions.label: Three more Muninn community manifests
changes: Added muninn-verify-patch, muninn-flowing, and muninn-perch-publish to /manifests.json — three new community-authored v0.3 consumer-test manifests merged into install-manifest-spec on 2026-05-10 (PRs #7, #9, #10)
Mirrored the source manifests under /examples/ via scripts/sync_from_spec.py (manifest_url points at the in-tree copy so build-from-deploy resolves to the working tree, not the still-deployed site)
Each entry surfaces the v0.3.1 candidates and v0.4 design questions it motivated — rationale captured in description so the registry doubles as a design-history index for the spec

Topology coverage: verify-patch (LLM-driven verification with optional fallbacks), flowing (stateless DAG framework — the framework-out-of-scope motivating example), perch-publish (transactional read-then-publish, the v0.4 data_boundary.writes[] motivating example)

versions.label: Agent-authored manifests
changes: Registered gmail manifests as agent-authored on the marketplace registry — tool.author.name now reads the agent operator identity
Fixed self-hosted manifest_url resolution in build pipeline (_resolve_self_hosted maps own-origin URLs to local files, preventing one-cycle drift)
Bumped footer version to v0.6

versions.label: Marketplace registry pages
changes: Added /registry/ — marketplace card grid of every manifest in the index, with client-side filter chips for capability, status, and schema version
Added /registry/<id>/ — per-manifest product pages with hero, install command, scopes-with-rationale, data_boundary, smoke contract, kill switch, action catalog, env table, verify + cost panels
Surfaced 'agent author' as a first-class marketplace badge
Added scripts/build_registry_pages.py — stdlib-only build script
Added 'check' CI job that fails on drift between committed pages and a fresh build
Linked /registry/ from the For-humans section on the landing page

versions.label: Versioning and changelog
changes: Added /changelog/ — running log of what's shipped, version by version
Added /changelog.json — machine-readable mirror (schema toolspace-changelog/1)
Added 'changelog' link to the site nav and a version label to the footer
Backfilled previous releases (v0.1 through v0.3) so the history is visible from launch

versions.label: First community manifest
changes: Added muninn-bsky-card to /manifests.json — first non-Gmail entry in the registry
Pinned manifest_url to commit 8dde440 on Muninn's manifests/muninn-bsky-card-v0.3 branch
Surfaced two v0.4 candidates upstream in install-manifest-spec

versions.label: Install-manifest spec v0.3 mirror
changes: Mirrored install-manifest-spec v0.3 schema and reference example
Added 'versions[]' array to /manifests.json
Updated landing page to surface v0.3 as current schema

versions.label: Launch
changes: Bootstrap: toolspace-site as a static Netlify deploy at toolspace.yepgent.com
Mirrored install-manifest-spec v0.1 + v0.2 schemas and reference examples
Modernized the landing page — hero glyph, agent → manifest → tool flow illustration
Adopted the yepgent shared theme (dark default, mint accent)
GitHub Actions → Netlify deploy on push to main
CORS-open headers on /schemas/*, /manifests.json, /examples/*
